summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 新增会话标题自动优化能力，聊天标题会更清晰，同时补充了默认标题跟踪。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added automatic conversation title optimization, so chats can get clearer titles with better default title tracking.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

会话标题自动优化能力

  • 变更说明: 新增会话标题自动优化能力，聊天标题会更清晰，同时补充了默认标题跟踪。
  • 影响范围: 影响 chat 相关功能、分布式会话运行时、提示词与任务引导。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话监控信息

  • 变更说明: 扩展了会话监控信息，新增运行时侧边栏、处理开始时间、使用量摘要，以及更结构化的消息更新。
  • 影响范围: 影响 conversation 相关功能、会话流程、messaging 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

安装引导流程

  • 变更说明: 优化了安装引导流程，向导现已支持安装 Skills CLI，并会在最后一步自动弹出桌面版 About 窗口。
  • 影响范围: 影响 wizard 相关功能、skills 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

会话和提案页面的实时同步

  • 变更说明: 改进了会话和提案页面的实时同步，减少页面加载过程中详情过期或顺序错乱的情况。
  • 影响范围: 影响 proposal 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。

消息与对话框体验

  • 变更说明: 优化了消息与对话框体验，隐藏 Hermes thinking 内容显示，并提升确认对话框的可访问性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 confirm-dialog 相关功能、messages 相关功能、会话流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该条目还包含配套的稳定性或清理工作，用来保证可见行为在新流程下保持可靠。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Automatic conversation title optimization

  • Change Summary: Added automatic conversation title optimization, so chats can get clearer titles with better default title tracking.
  • Impact: Affects Chat, distributed session runtime, prompt and task guidance.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session monitoring

  • Change Summary: Expanded session monitoring with a runtime sidebar, processing start time, usage summaries, and more structured message updates.
  • Impact: Affects Conversation, session workflows, Messaging.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session monitoring entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Setup flow by adding Skills CLI installation in the wizard

  • Change Summary: Improved setup flow by adding Skills CLI installation in the wizard and showing the desktop About window automatically at the final step.
  • Impact: Affects Wizard, Skills.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Real-time session and proposal syncing

  • Change Summary: Improved real-time session and proposal syncing, reducing stale or out-of-order details while pages load.
  • Impact: Affects Proposal, session workflows, Hagicode Core.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing real-time session and proposal syncing entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.

Message and dialog handling by filtering Hermes thinking from display and improving confirm dialog accessibility.

  • Change Summary: Refined message and dialog handling by filtering Hermes thinking from display and improving confirm dialog accessibility.
  • Impact: Affects Confirm Dialog, Messages, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing message and dialog handling by filtering hermes thinking from display and improving confirm dialog accessibility. entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: No additional migration step is expected; this version mainly improves the reliability of the existing flow.
